creator: pankov_p@mail.ru
text:
net/rrdtool port fails to install if NOPORTDOCS is defined either on command line or in /etc/make.conf. However it installs successfully without defining this variable.
Last lines of `cd /usr/ports/net/rrdtool && make NOPORTDOCS=YES install` output:

gmake  install-data-hook
gmake[3]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/net/rrdtool/work/rrdtool-1.2.19/doc'
cd /usr/local/share/doc/rrdtool/html && rm -f index.html && ln -s rrdtool.html index.html
cd: can't cd to /usr/local/share/doc/rrdtool/html
gmake[3]: *** [install-data-hook] Ошибка 2
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net/rrdtool/work/rrdtool-1.2.19/doc'
gmake[2]: *** [install-data-am] Ошибка 2
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net/rrdtool/work/rrdtool-1.2.19/doc'
gmake[1]: *** [install-am] Ошибка 2
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net/rrdtool/work/rrdtool-1.2.19/doc'
gmake: *** [install-recursive] Ошибка 1
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/net/rrdtool.

Full script of installation is accessible here: http://www.pankov.pp.ru/stuff/rrdtool/rrdtool-install-log.txt
Archived content of /usr/ports/net/rrdtool/work is accessible here: http://www.pankov.pp.ru/stuff/rrdtool/rrdtool-workdir.tar.bz2

Fix: 

Don't know.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/net/rrdtool && make NOPORTDOCS=YES install
